title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED, ENTITLED "AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS AND AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY."

chunks.text:
H. No. 7184 / 53 OG No. 22, 8039 (November 30, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2007, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED, ENTITLED "AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS AND AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY."

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Items (153) and (156), under paragraph

"aa.

Leyte," section two of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred are amended to read as follows:

"(153)

Construction of Home Economics Building, Central School, Capoocan

P10,000.00"

"(156)

Construction of upper Caghalo Barrio School, Carigara

P10,000.00"

SEC. 2. Under paragraph

"aa.

Leyte," section two of the same Act, the following item, to be known as item (162), is inserted:

"(162) Construction of San Vicente Barrio

School Building, Alang-alang P20,000.00"

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
